title: MrBoriiz's Cosmetics & Decorations
description: Have you dreamed of having more options to decorate your building or wanted your character to look better? Thanks to this datapack, it's possible! In a simple way, datapack adds over 330+ different cosmetics to the game.
body:
![MRBORIIZ'S COSMETICS LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FYfEgm7c/images/bf13339e5de361030b438043f58f06ff3ea4f949.png)




## About

A simple datapack that adds over 330+ new cosmetics to the game that you can wear or decorate your world with. Some of them are functional so they will help you play on your server with your friends.

## How to open menu / category?

Type in chat 
/function mbfp:menu

or when you reload datapack with /reload just click **OPEN MENU** in load message.
You can also get items by commands if you don't like menu.
For example:
/function mbfp:give/ *category* / *item*


## Do I need Optifine to use it?

No you don't. Resource pack is made on Custom Model Data which means you don't need Optifine to use it.

Have a suggestion what to add to the pack? Did you experienced a bug and need help? Or just want to show others how you used this datapack? Than join to our discord server! [CLICK ME TO JOIN](https://discord.gg/7FRuXpjsdh)
